# Go Learning Project - Copilot Instructions

This is a Go learning workspace organized in incremental lessons for beginners.

## Project Structure
- Each lesson is in its own numbered folder (01-basics, 02-variables, etc.)
- Each lesson contains example files and exercises
- Run Go files using `go run filename.go`

## Learning Path
1. Basics - Hello World, packages, imports
2. Variables - Declaration, types, constants
3. Data Types - Strings, numbers, booleans
4. Control Flow - If/else, switch, loops
5. Functions - Declaration, parameters, return values
6. Arrays & Slices - Collections and operations
7. Maps - Key-value data structures
8. Structs - Custom types
9. Pointers - Memory references
10. Interfaces - Abstraction and polymorphism
11. Error Handling - Error patterns in Go
12. Concurrency - Goroutines and channels

## Commands
- Run a file: `go run filename.go`
- Build: `go build`
- Format code: `go fmt`
- Run tests: `go test`
